image:image.image:title: Slave Duck Designer Toy
image:image.image:caption: Black leather aesthetic industrial rubber duck designer toy by Dirtcake Studio.

image:image.image:title: The Kiss Designer Toy
image:image.image:caption: Retro-glam resin sculpture designer toy with heart-shaped kiss detail.

image:image.image:title: Züreyder Mechanical Beast
image:image.image:caption: Industrial post apocalyptic tank-beast designer toy giraffe with weathered paint and grit.

image:image.image:title: Mister Giraffe Leisure Figure
image:image.image:caption: Designer toy giraffe with sweatband, slides, white socks and ice cream cone reminding a happy sunny day.

image:image.image:title: Sneaky Snake Designer Toy
image:image.image:caption: Vibrant reptile figure with jagged blade and cut tail detail.

image:image.image:title: Good Boy Resin Dog
image:image.image:caption: Luxury obedience dog designer toy with oversized industrial zipper detail.

image:image.image:title: Da Bomb Explosion Figure
image:image.image:caption: High-energy character designer resin toy with red shades and sneakers.

image:image.image:title: Manduck Action Figure
image:image.image:caption: Underground aesthetic man-duck action figure in leather harness and pants.

image:image.image:title: Real Friend Designer Toy
image:image.image:caption: Raw and dirty style resin sculpture.

image:image.image:title: Züreyder Hot Rod Upgrade Kit
image:image.image:caption: Marauder Hot Rod style chrome exhaust and engine parts upgrade kit for Zureyder.

image:image.image:title: Robits Sticker Pack Collection
image:image.image:caption: Robits Pack 1 holographic 90s robots sticker pack collection by Dirtcake Studio
